items.title: For Yankees fans, John Sterling was ours
items.summary: On Monday, we got the very sad news that former Yankees’ radio announcer John Sterling had passed away at the age of 87. The announcement was met with sadness from Yankees’ fans, but also from around the baseball world. The tributes from Yankee fans are hardly unexpected. Sterling had been the radio voice of the […]

items.title: Bobby Cox, legendary Braves manager and Hall of Famer, dead at 84
items.summary: Cox is most remembered for leading the Braves during their most prosperous era from the early 1990s through the mid-2000s, winning 14 straight National League East division titles from 1991-2005.
